provisional_interpretation.summary: 11 stored averages were raw-exportable from the running det=1.25 MHz Ramsey job; the analysis used a even snake-order subset (using first 10 of 11 stored averages for balance). The bridge remains running with final count text 'Final = 44.078 kcps', monitor last_error '', and stop_requested=False. Combined readout2/self-baseline FFT target-bin amplitudes are direct 13C 0.58%, det-13C 1.08%, carrier 1.36%, det+13C 1.17%, old det=1 high/static region 0.21%, static low region 0.56%, and previous 1.9 MHz region 0.20%. At only 500000 shots/point versus planned 800000, this is not claim-grade; use it as progress/provenance and wait for later even-subset or terminal data unless a hard anomaly appears.
provisional_interpretation.claim_policy: Do not fit a final T2star or claim 13C from this running autosave. Wait for terminal 16-average data unless a hard anomaly appears.
